query_normalized: statistical analysis of lottery number frequency and player behavior statistics
rationale: The paper focuses on emergent narrative behaviors in LLM-driven text adventure games, which is an off-domain topic entirely unrelated to the statistical analysis of lottery number frequencies or player betting behavior. It shares no measurable connection to the user's specific mechanism, domain, variables, or empirical setting, failing all inclusion criteria (a-f) and triggering the "off-domain entirely" rejection rule.
